column12: Single source of parameters/paths; imported by every stage and by tests

purpose: Merge + quality control + trajectory speed flags
principal_input: input.points_path (pointId, recordDate, lat, lon, device_name, totalTrashCount)
reproducibility_notes: No row deleted; only sensitive extra columns (e.g. image URL) dropped; deterministic

principal_input: input.validation_path (pointId, recordDate, device_name, manual_label[, false_positive_type, totalTrashCount])
reproducibility_notes: Optional stage; skipped if validation_path empty; precision only, not recall

purpose: Observation exposure on a 100 m grid + effective coverage
reproducibility_notes: Grid anchored at projected origin (0,0); valid distance over 'ok' segments only

purpose: 3 m seed-radius spatial deduplication into unique litter events
reproducibility_notes: Seed-radius via scipy cKDTree (numpy fallback); prevents single-link chaining; per-period independent

purpose: Normalized intensity and recurrence ratio per cell

reproducibility_notes: Spearman + Fisher-z CI; thresholds derived from data (80th pct of detected effective cells)

purpose: Build manuscript main tables from outputs
reproducibility_notes: Derived purely from analytical outputs; reproduces synthetic or real tables
Clean reproducible renderings (Times New Roman where available); 300 DPI

purpose: Generate the fully synthetic example input
main_parameters: SEED=12345, DEV_A/B/C, fictional coords lat~40/lon~140, year 2001
reproducibility_notes: No real data read/perturbed; designed to yield all four priority classes
